description: REV17 Stage-F acceptance apparatus manifest (rev 4: F1-F5 + G1-G3 + H1-H4).

acceptance/allowed_stage_p_paths_REV17.j.role: SCOPE: Stage-P allowed paths + frozen-not-editable list

acceptance/dead_blind_attribution_gate.p.role: GATE: dead-blind attribution (identity coverage + finite + scan-not-filter)

acceptance/mutation_audit_REV17.json.role: AUDIT: universal mutation audit (14 classes, all caught)

acceptance/row_bound_renderer_parity_gat.role: GATE: row-bound parity (strict canonical + composite + primary visible display + source coverage)

acceptance/seed_all_empty_with_nonempty_.role: SEED R1N: canonical + rendered empty while source expected non-empty

acceptance/seed_canonical_missing_ledger.role: SEED R1I: complete canonical record except explicit ledger_index

acceptance/seed_canonical_nonfinite_nume.role: SEED R1L: NaN / Infinity canonical sizing field

acceptance/seed_correct_only_in_tooltip..role: SEED R1P: correct amount only in an unrelated child / tooltip

acceptance/seed_cross_row_collision.json.role: SEED R1: cross-row collision — wrong Hero value masked by a correct caller

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_expected_omit.role: SEED R4F: expected dead-blind identity set omitted

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_ignored.json.role: SEED R4B: dead blind ignored entirely

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_live.json.role: SEED R4: dead blind treated as live

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_live_decrease.role: SEED R4E: dead blind decreases live commitment

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_nonfinite.jso.role: SEED R4G: NaN / Infinity dead-blind numeric field

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_removed.json.role: SEED R4D: expected dead-blind action removed (coverage)

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_wrong_action..role: SEED R4J: post_type=dead_blind with missing / wrong action

acceptance/seed_dead_blind_wrong_identit.role: SEED R4H: wrong dead-blind identity substituted (same count)

acceptance/seed_duplicate_primary_displa.role: SEED R1Q: duplicate primary action-sizing elements

acceptance/seed_equal_value_fallback.jso.role: SEED R2: equal-valued raw fallback — visual parity green, source raw

acceptance/seed_multiple_amounts_wrong_p.role: SEED R1R: multiple amounts with the wrong primary

acceptance/seed_raise_displays_physical..role: SEED R1E: raise displays the physical increment instead of total-to

acceptance/seed_shared_ledger_index_two_.role: SEED R1G: two hands share ledger index 20 (composite identity)

acceptance/seed_source_expected_canonica.role: SEED R1M: source-expected action omitted from canonical replay

acceptance/seed_sparse_canonical_record..role: SEED R1F: sparse / malformed canonical truth record

acceptance/seed_synthetic_rendered_list..role: SEED R1S: gate invoked with a synthetic pre-parsed list

acceptance/seed_visible_amount_omitted.j.role: SEED R1H: visible BB amount omitted

acceptance/seed_visible_wrong_plus_hidde.role: SEED R1O: wrong visible amount + hidden correct amount

acceptance/seed_wrong_player_action_iden.role: SEED R1C: correct numbers, wrong player/action identity

acceptance/structural_fixtures_REV17.jso.role: FIXTURES: strict canonical + primary display + dead-blind identity contracts

acceptance/zero_fallback_gate.py.role: GATE: zero raw-sizing fallback (source + coverage over strict canonical)

STAGE_P_REV17_PROMPT.md.role: PROMPT: the narrow REV17 Stage-P implementation spec
